completed_tasks.name: Wave 0 - install deps, models, migration, test scaffolding
Sync endpoint, scheduler, dashboard shell + Ultima sync indicator
checkpoint:human-verify - live Pipedrive sync verification
completed_tasks.progress: Backend/data verification DONE and committed (eaab460): talent-product mapping fixed for all 21 talents, build_field_maps v2 shape bug fixed, live sync succeeded (476 deals across the 4 real Pipedrive stages, correct talent/commission/sin-cotizar fields), all 31 tests pass. Only the frontend visual check (toast + 'Ultima sync' pill in browser) and SUMMARY.md remain.

remaining_tasks.name: Optional browser visual check + write 02-01-SUMMARY.md + update STATE/ROADMAP for plan 02-01 complete

human_actions_pending.action: Optional: open http://127.0.0.1:8000, log in as santillan@talentagency.mx / ChangeMe123!, click 'Sincronizar ahora', confirm 'Ultima sync' pill updates and a completion toast appears
human_actions_pending.context: Backend already verified via direct API call (sync succeeded, 476 deals, status=success) - this step only confirms the frontend renders that result correctly

decisions.decision: Renamed 8 talents in seed_talents.py to their exact Pipedrive product names (Deliberracion, Mama mecanic, Mariana Sanchez, Ale Voale, Elissa, Edgar Cardenas, Victor H, Dr Fitness) per user-supplied ground-truth mapping.
decisions.rationale: rapidfuzz auto-match failed because system talent names diverged from Pipedrive product names; renaming to exact names lets fuzzy match score 100 for all of these.

decisions.decision: Don Silverio and Don Wicho keep distinct Talent.name values (UNIQUE constraint on Talent.name) but both map to pipedrive_product_id=1 ('Don Silverio y Don Wicho') via a MANUAL_PRODUCT_MATCHES override dict in match_talent_products.py.
decisions.rationale: One Pipedrive product covers two talents performing together; renaming both talents to the identical product name would violate D-13's UNIQUE constraint.

decisions.decision: Added NO_PRODUCT_TALENTS = {Dulce, Tony Franco, Casandra Salinas} in match_talent_products.py - always reported unmatched regardless of fuzzy score.
decisions.rationale: These 3 talents have no Pipedrive product yet (D-15); explicit list guarantees they never get a false-positive fuzzy match.

decisions.decision: Fixed pipedrive.build_field_maps to read field_name/field_code (v2 shape) instead of name/key; updated tests/conftest.py PIPEDRIVE_DEAL_FIELDS mock to match.
decisions.rationale: Live /dealFields returns field_name/field_code, not v1-style name/key. The old code raised KeyError('name') and crashed every sync (SyncLog status=error).

decisions.decision: Ran 'alembic upgrade head' on the live seg.db (was at 324116cbf0dd, one revision behind c35f623eaa21).
decisions.rationale: Missing deals/deal_stage_events/sync_logs tables caused 'OperationalError: no such table: sync_logs' on /sync/status and /sync/pipedrive.

decisions.decision: Ran seed_admin to create user santillan@talentagency.mx / ChangeMe123! (values already in .env).
decisions.rationale: .env ADMIN_EMAIL didn't match the only seeded user (admin@santillanent.com, from earlier Phase 1 setup) - login with .env credentials was failing.

decisions.decision: Documented in app/sync/jobs.py that PIPE-05's 6-stage funnel is 4 stages from Pipedrive (ids 6-9: Llamada/Cotizacion/Negociacion/Contrato y factura) + 2 stages ('En ejecucion', 'Cobranza') from Trello in Phase 4 - confirmed live and by user.
decisions.rationale: Critical for Wave 2 (02-02) funnel.py - must not assume Pipedrive /stages returns all 6 PIPE-05 stages.

decisions.decision: Audited all integration code (app/integrations/, app/sync/, app/scripts/) and confirmed every Pipedrive call is GET-only via get_with_retry/paginate; no Trello/Sheets integration exists yet.
decisions.rationale: User issued an explicit production-safety directive: dashboard must be read-only against Pipedrive/Trello/Sheets, writes only to local seg.db.

next_action: Optional browser visual check (see human_actions_pending), then write .planning/phases/02-pipedrive-integration-core-dashboard/02-01-SUMMARY.md, commit it, update STATE.md/ROADMAP.md to mark plan 02-01 complete, then continue /gsd-execute-phase 02 for Wave 2 (02-02 Resumen+Funnel).
context_notes: Plan 02-01 is functionally complete and fully verified end-to-end against real Pipedrive data (476 deals synced, correct talent/commission/sin-cotizar fields, all 21 talents correctly mapped to Pipedrive products or explicitly unmapped). All code changes committed to main at eaab460. Remaining work is documentation-only (SUMMARY.md, STATE/ROADMAP) plus an optional, non-blocking UI visual confirmation.
